# <type>: <short summary>
#
# Recommended types:
# feat: new feature
# fix: bug fix
# refactor: code cleanup without behavior change
# perf: performance improvement
# docs: documentation only
# chore: tooling / workflow / maintenance
# style: formatting / non-functional UI polish
# test: tests only
#
# Good examples:
# feat: add tree prompt child image generation
# fix: preserve reference images when retrying failed nodes
# refactor: simplify workspace canvas pointer targeting
#
# Optional body:
# Why:
# - what problem this change solves
#
# Includes:
# - key user-visible change 1
# - key user-visible change 2
